posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Let me introduce myself Darshan Hiranandani, I’ve set up several project templates in my portfolio management system, and they’re working well. However, I’m encountering an issue where the “standard project” template provided by monday.com always appears at the top of the template list and is selected by default. I want to prevent users from selecting this template and instead have one of my custom templates set as the default.

I appreciate any guidance or tips you can provide on customizing templates in monday.com for better portfolio management. Thank you!

Regards
Darshan Hiranandani
